name: Ayesha Rahman
bio: Met during freshman year at BUET. We used to pull all-nighters before exams. She moved to Toronto after grad school but we still try to catch up regularly.

name: Tanvir Hossain
bio: My first manager at the company. Taught me more about software architecture than any course ever did. We grab coffee every few weeks.

name: Sara Chowdhury
bio: Grew up two streets apart. Our families have been close for decades. She runs a small bakery now and sends me sweets every Eid.

name: Mehedi Islam
bio: We bonded over competitive programming in university. He's now a senior engineer at a fintech startup in Dhaka. Always has the best opinions on side projects.

name: Nadia Karim
bio: Met on a group trip to Cox's Bazar in 2019. We've traveled to four countries together since. Planning a trip to Nepal next year.

name: Rafiul Alam
bio: We worked at the same office for three years. Still meet for lunch once a month even after he switched companies. Great listener and always gives honest advice.

name: Priya Sen
bio: My go-to person for design feedback. We studied together at DU and she's now a UX lead at an agency in Kolkata. Distance has made keeping in touch harder lately.

name: Sabbir Ahmed
bio: We've been workout partners for two years. Beyond the gym, he's become one of my closest friends. Always motivating and brutally honest when I need it.
